Name: Ivysaur
Effects: Search your deck for up to 2 Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Venusaur
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may flip a coin. If heads, switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with their Active Pokémon, and the new Active Pokémon is now Asleep and Poisoned.

Name: Radiant Venusaur
Ability-Effect: Once at the end of your turn (after your attack), you may use this Ability. Draw cards until you have 4 cards in your hand.
Effects: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned, Confused, and Poisoned.

Name: Alolan Exeggutor V
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for up to 5 [G] Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.
This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon for each [G] Energy attached to this Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Spinarak
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

Name: Ariados
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed and Poisoned.
Heal 50 damage from this Pokémon.

Name: Charmander
Effects: Search your deck for a [R] Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Charmeleon
Effects: Discard a [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

Name: Radiant Charizard
Ability-Effect: This Pokémon's attacks cost [C] less for each Prize card your opponent has taken.
Effects: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Combustion Blast.

Name: Charizard
Ability-Effect: Each basic [R] Energy attached to your Pokémon provides [R][R] Energy. You can't apply more than 1 Burn Brightly Ability at a time.
Effects: Discard all [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

Name: Moltres
Ability-Effect: Your Basic [R] Pokémon's attacks, except any Moltres, do 10 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Name: Camerupt
Effects: This attack does 50 damage to 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )

Name: Numel
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 50 more damage.

Name: Wartortle
Effects: This attack does 10 more damage for each [W] Energy attached to this Pokémon.

Name: Blastoise
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for up to 6 Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck. If you use this Ability, your turn ends.
Effects: This attack does 30 more damage for each [W] Energy attached to this Pokémon.

Name: Radiant Blastoise
Ability-Effect: You must discard a [W] Energy card from your hand in order to use this Ability. Once during your turn, you may put 2 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.
Effects: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Torrential Cannon.

Name: Slowpoke
Effects: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.
Put an Item card from your discard pile into your hand.

Name: Slowbro
Effects: Both Active Pokémon are now Asleep.
You can use this attack only if your opponent has exactly 1 Prize card remaining. Take 2 Prize cards.

Name: Gyarados
Effects: Flip a coin until you get tails. For each heads, discard the top 2 cards of your opponent's deck.
Discard the top 5 cards of your deck.

Name: Magikarp
Effects: Search your deck for any number of Magikarp, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
This attack does 30 more damage for each Magikarp and Gyarados in your discard pile.

Name: Articuno
Ability-Effect: Your Basic [W] Pokémon's attacks, except any Articuno, do 10 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Name: Wimpod
Ability-Effect: If your opponent has any Pokémon V in play, this Pokémon has no Retreat Cost.

Name: Lapras
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Name: Golisopod
Effects: If this Pokémon moved from your Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does 90 more damage.

Name: Pikachu
Effects: If you played a Supporter card from your hand during this turn, this attack does 30 more damage.

Name: Pikachu
Effects: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

Name: Zapdos
Ability-Effect: Your Basic [L] Pokémon's attacks, except any Zapdos, do 10 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Name: Mewtwo V
Effects: Move an Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Mewtwo VSTAR
Effects: Discard up to 3 [P] Energy from your Pokémon. This attack does 90 damage for each card you discarded in this way.
This attack does 120 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon V. This damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Natu
Effects: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

Name: Xatu
Effects: This attack does 90 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon V. This damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.
Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

Name: Lunatone
Effects: Discard a card from your hand. If you do, draw 3 cards.
This attack does 30 more damage for each [P] Energy attached to this Pokémon.

Name: Sylveon
Effects: Search your deck for up to 2 cards and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a [N] Pokémon, this attack does 90 more damage.

Name: Onix
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.
This attack does 50 damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

Name: Larvitar
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

Name: Pupitar
Effects: This attack also does 20 damage to each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's). (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )

Name: Solrock
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may attach a [P] Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Lunatone.

Name: Conkeldurr V
Effects: If this Pokémon was damaged by an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does that much more damage.
Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 90 more damage, and your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Alolan Raticate
Effects: Search your deck for a card and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
Put damage counters on your opponent's Active Pokémon until its remaining HP is 10.

Name: Alolan Rattata
Effects: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

Name: Tyranitar
Effects: This attack does 10 damage for each damage counter on all of your Benched Pokémon.
This attack also does 20 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )

Name: Steelix
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

Name: Meltan
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Name: Melmetal
Effects: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 90 more damage for each heads.

Name: Melmetal V
Effects: You may attach a [M] Energy card from your hand to this Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Melmetal VMAX
Effects: This attack does 60 more damage for each extra [M] Energy attached to this Pokémon (in addition to this attack's cost). You can't add more than 120 damage in this way.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Dragonite V
Effects: Discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Dragonite VSTAR
Effects: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

Look at the top 12 cards of your deck and attach any number of [W] or [L] Energy cards you find there to your Pokémon in any way you like. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Chansey
Effects: Heal 30 damage from 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

Name: Ditto
Ability-Effect: This Pokémon can use the attacks of any Basic Pokémon in your discard pile, except for Pokémon with a Rule Box (Pokémon V, Pokémon-GX, etc. have Rule Boxes). (You still need the necessary Energy to use each attack. )

Name: Blissey
Effects: Heal all damage from 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

Name: Eevee
Effects: Choose a random card from your opponent's hand. Your opponent reveals that card and shuffles it into their deck.

Name: Snorlax
Ability-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, your opponent's Active Pokémon can't retreat.
Effects: This Pokémon is now Asleep.

Name: Aipom
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

Name: Ambipom
Ability-Effect: If any damage is done to this Pokémon by attacks, flip a coin. If heads, prevent that damage.
Effects: Flip a coin for each Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 60 damage for each heads.

Name: Bidoof
Effects: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

Name: Slaking V
Ability-Effect: If you have exactly 2, 4, or 6 Prize cards remaining, this Pokémon can't attack.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Bibarel
Ability-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, cards in your deck can't be discarded by effects of your opponent's attacks, Abilities, Item cards, or Supporter cards.

Name: Pidove
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon's attacks do 20 less damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Name: Tranquill
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

Name: Blanche
Description: Draw 2 cards. If you drew any cards in this way, flip a coin. If heads, attach a [W] Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

Name: Unfezant
Effects: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 70 damage for each heads.

Name: Candela
Description: Draw 2 cards. If you drew any cards in this way, flip a coin. If heads, attach a [R] Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

Name: Egg Incubator
Description: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a Basic Pokémon, put it onto your Bench, and shuffle your deck. If tails, put this Egg Incubator on the bottom of your deck instead of in the discard pile.

Name: Lure Module
Description: Each player reveals the top 3 cards of their deck and puts all Pokémon they find there into their hand. Then, each player shuffles the other cards back into their deck.

Name: PokéStop
Description: Once during each player's turn, that player may discard 3 cards from the top of their deck. If a player discarded any Item cards in this way, they put those Item cards into their hand.

Name: Rare Candy
Description: Choose 1 of your Basic Pokémon in play. If you have a Stage 2 card in your hand that evolves from that Pokémon, put that card on the Basic Pokémon. (This counts as evolving that Pokémon. ) You can't use this card during your first turn or on a Basic Pokémon that was put into play this turn.

Name: Spark
Description: Draw 2 cards. If you drew any cards in this way, flip a coin. If heads, attach a [L] Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

Effects: Move an Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
